subcodes.first_line: O Beloved of my heart! On this day, which is Thursday the eighteenth of the sacred month of Dhi'l-Qa'dah, the letter of that Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوب فوادی الیوم که پنجشنبه هیجدهم شهر ذی القعده الحرامست دستخط آنمحبوب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement
